<!--
Thanks for contributing to svelte-lens!

If your change affects published behavior (any code in packages/svelte-lens),
remember to add a changeset:

    pnpm changeset

Pick the appropriate semver bump (major/minor/patch) and write a user-facing
note. The changeset is consumed by the Version PR workflow on merge.

Docs-only, test-only, or CI-only changes don't need a changeset.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects published behavior
- [ ] I ran `pnpm format` and `pnpm test`
- [ ] I updated docs/README if user-facing behavior changed

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay special attention to -->
